title: myobroma humilis
intro: Myobroma humilis, also known as the small myrtle, is a plant species that belongs to the family Loganiaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Myobroma humilis include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Myobroma humilis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
